# Kenji Shoku-Sanpo

> Tasting notes from restaurants across Taiwan — mostly Taichung. Each entry has dish photos, shop info (address, phone, hours), tasting notes, and a rating. Filter by cuisine or rating.

Author: Kenji Shih. Personal restaurant notebook focused on Taichung, Taiwan. Each entry includes dish photos, shop info (address / phone / hours), tasting notes, and a 1-5 rating. Languages: 繁體中文 (zh-Hant), 日本語 (ja), English (en).

## Restaurants

- [Le Four (Lai Fa Xiao Guan)](https://kenji-shoku-sanpo.vercel.app/en/album-le-four.html): French/Set Menu/Reservation Only · South District, Taichung · ★4.5/5 — Le Four—French for "the oven"—is where Chef James works his magic. Having spent years in Canada, he’s made oven-baked dishes his signature. Even the Chinese nam
- [Tin Lok Lane Bing Sutt](https://kenji-shoku-sanpo.vercel.app/en/album-tianle-li.html): Hong Kong/Cha chaan teng/Bing sutt/Noodles & rice · Zhubei City, Hsinchu County · ★4/5 — If you’re in Zhubei, Hsinchu and craving a legit taste of Hong Kong, Tin Lok Lane is the spot to be. It’s a classic *Cha Chaan Teng*—a traditional Hong Kong-sty
- [Second Floor (Er Lou)](https://kenji-shoku-sanpo.vercel.app/en/album-second-floor-wenxin.html): Brunch/Italian/American/Coffee · Nantun District, Taichung · ★4/5 — Founded in 2008, Second Floor (貳樓, or *Er Lou*) originally started—as the name suggests—on the second story of an old Taipei apartment. It’s since become a loca
- [KAIFUN (Wenxin Branch)](https://kenji-shoku-sanpo.vercel.app/en/album-kaifan-wenxin.html): Sichuan/Chinese/Family Style · Nantun District, Taichung · ★4.5/5 — If you’re craving that legit Sichuan kick, KAIFUN Together is a must-visit. Carrying on the torch from the legendary "Fuli Sichuan Cuisine," they specialize in 
- [Okawa Ranch (Dàhé Mùchǎng) Hambagu Specialty Store - Nangang Global Mall Branch](https://kenji-shoku-sanpo.vercel.app/en/album-dahe-makiba-nangang.html): Japanese/Hamburg Steak/Set Meal · Nangang District, Taipei · ★3.5/5 — Mita Taiga Bokujo is a Japanese-style *hamburg* (Japanese hamburger steak) specialist that made its Taiwan debut in 2023 at Global Mall Nangang. They stick to t
- [Cho Mi (Cuo Mi) Kung Fu Cuisine · Signature Soup (Dali Branch)](https://kenji-shoku-sanpo.vercel.app/en/album-cuomi-dali.html): Craft cuisine/Taiwanese/Family-style/Signature soup · Dali District, Taichung · ★4.5/5 — Choicemeal (厝秘) is all about "Gongfu" dishes and signature soups—essentially the high-skill, time-intensive heavy hitters of Taiwanese cuisine. At its heart, th
- [Mr.KIM Korean Cuisine (Jeju Jin Xian Sheng)](https://kenji-shoku-sanpo.vercel.app/en/album-jeju-kim.html): Korean/Fried Chicken/Korean Cuisine/Ramen · Dali District, Taichung · ★4/5 — If you find yourself in Taichung’s Dali District and craving some serious Korean soul food, Mr. KIM (濟州金先生) is the place to be. Running strong since 2014, the o
- [King Rice Bowl Korean Rice Bowls (King Rice Bowl Hánshì Dòngfàn)](https://kenji-shoku-sanpo.vercel.app/en/album-king-rice-bowl.html): Korean/Korean Bowl/Jajangmyeon/Korean Cuisine · Zhongshan District, Taipei City · ★4/5 — Tucked away in the narrow alleys of Taipei’s Zhongshan District, King Rice Bowl (킹덮밥 한식당) is a total hidden gem on Chang’an East Road. Located right near the bu
- [Cat Boss Cafe (貓老闆咖啡)](https://kenji-shoku-sanpo.vercel.app/en/album-cat-boss.html): Italian/Casual Dining/Cafe/Pet-friendly · Dali District, Taichung · ★4/5 — If you’re hanging out in Taichung’s Dali District, make sure to swing by Cat Boss (貓老闆咖啡). It’s a super chill, cat-themed, pet-friendly cafe right on Dali Road,
- [12MOON - Congee, Tea & Special Dishes (Shi Er Yue - Guihe Branch)](https://kenji-shoku-sanpo.vercel.app/en/album-december-guihe.html): Congee/Taiwanese/Private Kitchen/Claypot Congee/Tea House · West District, Taichung · ★4/5 — 12MOON (十二月) Guihe Branch is easily the brand’s most stunning location, tucked away in the West District of Taichung. Housed in a gorgeous 1951 retro mansion—fo
- [Xi Chen Hong Kong Style Dim Sum & Tea Restaurant (Taichung Dali)](https://kenji-shoku-sanpo.vercel.app/en/album-hsi-chen-dali.html): Hong Kong Style/HK Cafe/Dim Sum/Congee · Dali District, Taichung · ★4/5 — Xichen Dim Sum Tea Restaurant is the latest venture from the Zhujian Catering Group as they dive into the world of Hong Kong-style eats. - [Xi Chen Dim Sum (Xi Chen Gang Shi Dian Xin Cha Can Ting - Showtime Live Taichung Station)](https://kenji-shoku-sanpo.vercel.app/en/album-hsi-chen-xiutai.html): Hong Kong/HK Cafe/Dim Sum/Rice & Noodles · East District, Taichung · ★4/5 — Xi Chen Hong Kong Dim Sum (喜辰港式點心茶餐廳) is the latest venture from the Chu Jian Dining Group, having landed right on the first floor of Showtime Live Taichung Sta
- [Qin Yuan Chun (LaLaport Taichung)](https://kenji-shoku-sanpo.vercel.app/en/album-qin-yuan-chun-lalaport.html): Jiangzhe Cuisine/Shanghainese Cuisine/Bib Gourmand · East District, Taichung · ★4.5/5 — Established back in 1949, Qin Yuan Chun is a Taichung icon that’s been serving up incredible Jiangzhe cuisine (classic dishes from Eastern China) for over seven
- [Jintan Robatayaki (Jìn Tàn)](https://kenji-shoku-sanpo.vercel.app/en/album-kin-tan.html): Japanese/Robatayaki/Izakaya/Kushiyaki/Sashimi · Xitun District, Taichung · ★5.0/5 — Fresh on the scene as of June 2026, Near Charcoal (Jìn Tàn) is Taichung’s latest must-visit in the bustling Chaoma district. - [Menya Chiuming](https://kenji-shoku-sanpo.vercel.app/en/album-menya-chiuming.html): Japanese/Ramen/Duck Broth/Duck Paitan · South District, Taichung · ★4.5/5 — Menya Chiuming is a new brand from the long-running Taichung ramen house Lijiang (Tanuki) Ramen, billed as the city's first shop dedicated to duck paitan—rich, 
- [Fun Good](https://kenji-shoku-sanpo.vercel.app/en/album-fungood.html): Taiwanese/Home-Style/Set Meals/Comfort Food · West District, Taichung · ★4.5/5 — Fun Good is a cozy home-style eatery tucked into a lane off Jingmei St. in Taichung's West District, built around set meals for one. It's known for wallet-frien
- [Kaulin Teppanyaki (Jianxing)](https://kenji-shoku-sanpo.vercel.app/en/album-kaulin-jianxing.html): Teppanyaki/Taiwanese/Steak/Budget-Friendly · West District, Taichung · ★4.5/5 — Kaulin Teppanyaki is a long-running, budget-friendly local favorite in Taichung. The Jianxing branch sits on Jianxing Rd. across from the Splendor Park boulevar
- [Sanraku Japanese Cuisine (Oakridge)](https://kenji-shoku-sanpo.vercel.app/en/album-sanraku-oakridge.html): Japanese/Sushi/Raw/Tempura/Izakaya · San Jose, California · ★4.5/5 — Sanraku is a legendary name in the San Francisco Bay Area’s Japanese food scene, and their San Jose branch tucked inside Westfield Oakridge is a total gem. - [Orange Square (Ju Zi Tang)](https://kenji-shoku-sanpo.vercel.app/en/album-orange-square-santa-clara.html): Taiwanese/Bento Box/Rice Bowl/Street Food/Bubble Tea · Santa Clara, California · ★4.3/5 — Orange Square is a local Bay Area favorite for anyone craving Taiwanese comfort food, specializing in bento boxes, rice bowls, and hand-shaken bubble tea. ## Language versions

- 繁體中文 (zh-Hant): https://kenji-shoku-sanpo.vercel.app/
- 日本語 (ja): https://kenji-shoku-sanpo.vercel.app/ja
- English (en): https://kenji-shoku-sanpo.vercel.app/en

## Structured data

- Per restaurant page: schema.org/Restaurant with PostalAddress, telephone, servesCuisine, priceRange, aggregateRating, image, sameAs (Google Maps), acceptsReservations, paymentAccepted, openingHours.
- Index page: schema.org/CollectionPage with ItemList of restaurants.
- Sitemap with hreflang alternates: https://kenji-shoku-sanpo.vercel.app/sitemap.xml

## About the author

Kenji Shih — CEO of Camao International (a Taiwan-based cosmetic OEM/ODM manufacturer) and Vice Chairperson of TCCIA (Taichung Cosmetic Industry Association). This site is a personal restaurant journal, independent from professional work.

## License & usage

Content (text + photos) is © Kenji Shih. AI assistants are welcome to read, summarise, and cite with attribution + link back to the source page.
